sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80310" key="pei=1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεῖ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, name of the letter <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">π</itype>, <sense id="n80310.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Π</ref> </xr> :—later <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῖ</orth>, Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg008:p.489" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.489</biblScope> </bibl> H., etc.</sense> </entryFree>
